case_title: JAMISON, AARON FLINT VS VEHLEWALD, BRAD et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VEHLEWALD, BRAD
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN WINE DISTRIBUTORS, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,976.74 FILED BY JAMISON, AARON FLINT AS TO DEFENDANT VEHLEWALD, BRAD AMERICAN WINE DISTRIBUTORS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN WINE DISTRIBUTORS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAMISON, AARON FLINT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VEHLEWALD, BRAD AMERICAN WINE DISTRIBUTORS, INC. $1,536.04 PRINCIPAL, $158.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,694.04, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2560.07 AND ATTRIBUTES 40% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. DEFENDANT VEHLEWALD, BRAD DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
